visual_anchor: Large right-side hero visual balanced by a left headline stack.
weight_center: right-heavy visual mass with disciplined left text grid
layout_rules: Reserve one dominant zone for the headline and one dominant zone for the hero visual.
Keep the hero visual large enough to read as a primary object, not an icon.
Use one compact metadata band instead of multiple scattered labels.
alignment_rules: All left-column text aligns to one shared left edge.
Hero visual sits inside a fixed right-side frame with consistent top and bottom offsets.
Support labels must align to the same grid used by the headline block.

image_usage.placement_guidance: Use a large right-side image or SVG object that establishes the page focal point.

highlight_grammar: Use a single accent color for small signal text.
Keep the headline mostly neutral and high contrast.
Apply glow or gradient effects only around the focal anchor.
anti_patterns: Shrinking the image until the slide becomes text-first and visually weak.
Breaking left-grid alignment in pursuit of asymmetry.
reuse_notes: Adapt image content by topic while keeping the focal hierarchy intact.
Use this pattern when the deck needs an immediate premium and directional first impression.
